#  Add a Compliance Document to a Subcontractor Invoice 
#####  General Availability in Select Markets (United States)
![Flag Us](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/eb8f21ce49403a47d7bb5a0cedc7e0e9/7c0ec0977e654cc6bc9f3d8efa80fbe3/flag-us.png?fm=webp&h=14) [Procore Pay ](https://www.procore.com/pay) is available in the United States. It is designed for General Contractors and Owner-Builders who act as their own General Contractors on a job. Procore Pay extends the [Invoice Management](https://www.procore.com/invoice-management) functionality in the Procore web application to handle the payment process between general and specialty contractors.
##  Background 
Invoice administrators on a Procore project can add compliance documents for a payee to ensure payment requirements are met and verified on project invoices from the Commitments or Invoicing tool. Payments Admins and Disbursers with invoice administrator permissions on a project can also perform this action for payees. Invoice contacts can only perform this action with the payor's permission.
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/permissions)


##  Steps 
  1. Open a subcontractor invoice from the **Commitments** , **Invoicing** , or **Payments** tool.
  2. Click the **Compliance** tab.
  3. Click **Create New**.
  4. In the **Document Details** pane, do the following:
     * **Attachments**. Click **Attach Files** or drag and drop file(s) to the attachments area.
     * **Document Type**. Select a document type from the list: _Bond_ , _Closeout_ , _License_ , _Master Agreement_ , _Other_ , _Payroll_ , _Permit_ , _Project Insurance_ , _Safety_ , _Stored Material_ , or _W-9_.
     * **Document Name**. Type a name for the document.
     * **Effective Date**. Select or enter the effective date.
     * **Expiration Date**. Select or enter the expiration date.
  5. Click **Save**.   
This changes the document status from _Not Submitted_ to _Submitted_.


## See Also
  * [Upload a Compliance Document to a Subcontractor Invoice](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/upload-a-compliance-document-to-a-subcontractor-invoice)
  * [Configure Payment Requirements as a Payor](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/configure-payment-requirements-as-a-payor)
  * [View Payment Requirements as a Payor](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/view-payment-requirements-as-a-payor)
title: Add a Compliance Document to a Subcontractor Invoice
description: How to add a compliance document to a subcontractor invoice when using the Invoice Management tools with Procore Pay.
